compositional_truth_check.p4_black_pot_shared: Not visually distinct from P2/P3; likely integrated or lost.

inventory_reconciliation.notes: The registry-defined specimens (String of Nickels, Mexican Mint, Silver Guest) are not visible. Only a single, struggling leaf remains in the P3/P4 cluster.

plant_audit.p1: Empty soil. No signs of String of Nickels.
plant_audit.p2: Empty soil. No signs of Mexican Mint.
plant_audit.p3: Single leaf remaining. Shows signs of chlorosis and severe dehydration.
plant_audit.p4: Integrated into P3/P2 space; no distinct specimen identified.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, potentially waterlogged or high organic content; no surface crusting.
biome_observations.anomalies: Presence of white, calcified debris (likely crushed eggshells) in the black pot, serving as a soil amendment or pest deterrent.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows a single green leaf in the black pot.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t2: Leaf in black pot shows signs of drooping/postural collapse.
temporal_deltas.t1_to_current: Severe lighting drop (underexposure) makes visual confirmation difficult, but the leaf structure appears to have further retracted or withered.

visual_health_inference.reasoning: The lack of foliage in P1 and P2 indicates a total loss of those specimens. The remaining leaf in P3 is the only biological activity, and its posture suggests imminent senescence.

anomalies: Crushed eggshell fragments in P3/P4 soil.
Extreme underexposure in T-1 and Current images hindering full spectrum analysis.
vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is in a state of advanced decline. The registry-listed plants are largely absent, suggesting a failure in the indoor environment or care regimen. The remaining specimen is struggling to maintain turgor pressure. The presence of eggshells suggests an attempt at nutrient supplementation or pest management that has not prevented the systemic loss of the primary collection.
